root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_010_009000.balance_date, vr_nsk_010_009000.loan_code, vr_nsk_010_009000.loan_code_desc, vr_nsk_010_009000.member_status_code, vr_nsk_010_009000.member_status_name, vr_nsk_010_009000.loan_type, vr_nsk_010_009000.loan_type_description, vr_nsk_010_009000.count_con, vr_nsk_010_009000.emer_balance, vr_nsk_010_009000.emer_intarr, vr_nsk_010_009000.emer_shot, vr_nsk_010_009000.emer_long FROM vr_nsk_010_009000 where vr_nsk_010_009000.balance_date = '!balance_date_1!' /*WHERE*/
